param.name: kAAITParam_isAvoidHighRisk
kAAITParam_isStepForwardWithdraw

debug_text.chance: if @$debugchance then $debugchance else (if @this.assignedcontrolled.idcode == @global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode or (@global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode == 'all' and (@$kAAITParam_isAvoidHighRisk or @$kAAITParam_isStepForwardWithdraw or @$kAAITParam_iskAAITOrder)) then @global.$kAAIT_Data.$debugChance_boarding else 0)

debug_text.text: @this.assignedcontrolled.idcode + ' signal received. moving to launch pods.'
debug_text.chance: if @$debugchance then $debugchance else (if @this.assignedcontrolled.idcode == @global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode or (@global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode == 'all' and (@$kAAITParam_isAvoidHighRisk or @$kAAITParam_isStepForwardWithdraw or @$kAAITParam_iskAAITOrder)) then @global.$kAAIT_Data.$debugChance_boarding else 0)

if @$debugchance then $debugchance else (if @this.assignedcontrolled.idcode == @global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode or (@global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode == 'all' and (@$kAAITParam_isAvoidHighRisk or @$kAAITParam_isStepForwardWithdraw or @$kAAITParam_iskAAITOrder)) then @global.$kAAIT_Data.$debugChance_boarding else 0)

if @$debugchance then $debugchance else (if @this.assignedcontrolled.idcode == @global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode or (@global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode == 'all' and (@$kAAITParam_isAvoidHighRisk or @$kAAITParam_isStepForwardWithdraw or @$kAAITParam_iskAAITOrder)) then @global.$kAAIT_Data.$debugChance_boarding else 0)

set_value.name: $kAAIT_isBoardingAttackBehaviourValid
set_value.comment: check that behaviour is an attack behaviour

debug_text.chance: if @$debugchance then $debugchance else (if @this.assignedcontrolled.idcode == @global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode or (@global.$kAAIT.$debugChance_idCode == 'all' and (@$kAAITParam_isAvoidHighRisk or @$kAAITParam_isStepForwardWithdraw or @$kAAITParam_iskAAITOrder)) then @global.$kAAIT_Data.$debugChance_boarding else 0)

wait.comment: stop this order from continuing as the new order is created
